name: asset-serving-with-auth
description: Auth-gated endpoint serving logo/banner/screenshots/markdown from the catalog with path-traversal protection and content-type detection.
postInstall: 1. Just copy the file — no DB, no env vars
2. Reference assets in components as /api/asset/<type>/<slug>/logo etc.
3. To make assets public (no auth), remove the getServerSession check at the top
